response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network security, embedded switching, or hardware-level firmware development — all central to the role. His experience is primarily in web, mobile, and general-purpose software using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of embedded networking or security protocol implementation.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Experience with Linux, Docker, and CI/CD infrastructure setup
concerns: No proven C programming experience in embedded or UNIX kernel contexts
Lacks native Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No exposure to LAN-switch security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) or embedded firmware
